features: Dual-Purpose: Acting as both a deodorant and body spray, it counters body odour whilst providing a head-to-toe fragrance
Multi-Pack: This pack contains 3 x 150ml Blue Stratos Classic Blue Deodorant Body Sprays for longer-lasting fragrance
Original Blue Scent: Formulated with base notes of cedarwood, vanilla, and musk, complimented by hints of geranium, rose, and a dash of lavender, the scent is classic yet daring
On-the-Go Application: The aerosol applicator allows for quick bursts of fragrance, so you can top up your scent even when you’re on the go
Our Brand: Blue Stratos supplies classic, masculine fragrances and has been turning heads for half a century with its timeless, tried and tested blends.
